scope_1_emissions.description: Direct emissions from owned or controlled sources

scope_2_emissions.description: Indirect emissions from the generation of purchased electricity

scope_3_emissions.description: All other indirect emissions in the value chain

renewable_energy_ratio.description: Percentage of total energy consumed originating from renewable sources

training_hours_per_employee.description: Average occupational and skills training hours completed per employee

independent_directors_ratio.description: Ratio of independent directors on the board

whistleblower_cases_resolved.description: Percentage of active whistleblower reports fully investigated and resolved

anti_corruption_training_completion.description: Percentage of workforce completed mandatory anti-corruption training
